lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Mamba ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Mamba
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, price, and outfitting reference for the Mamba.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Mamba hull profile, top speed, hardpoints, and role notes.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Head-to-head comparison of the Mamba and Fer-de-Lance, weighing the Mamba's straight-line speed and large mount against the FDL's agility.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: First-impressions review of the Mamba and Krait Phantom at launch, covering speed, the large hardpoint, fixed-weapon firing passes, and heat.
